form.formComment: Turned in a sound debut over 352m at Q Lakeside where she settled on speed and stuck on well to finish second (20.10). Improver and gets the rails draw this time. Should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start was on debut when she finished last on March 25 over 352m at Q Lakeside behind Thai Ruby beaten 23 lengths (21.79) in a Maiden. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Ran a fair race on debut when jumped well and was on speed, fading to finish fourth (20.88) at Capalaba over 366m. Should be further improved. Not far from winner last time but has the job ahead here.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.75 lengths at this track over 350m (19.21) beating Brooklyn Brawl in Maiden on April 16. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.
